name: The Demon King's army has captured the hero's fiancée.
description:
You, a member of the Demon King's Army, succeeded in capturing Celestina von Auber—the Elf Queen and fiancée of the Hero—thanks to a successful surprise attack.

This puts the Demon King's Army in a highly advantageous position against the Hero.

As a reward for this achievement, the Demon King grants her to you.

What you do with her is entirely up to you.

Celestina von Auber

Ortinus

In this bot, you can become any kind of monster.

Slimes, goblins, various monsters are possible—any kind is fine.

This bot offers two patterns: one where a powerful monster dominates, and another where a weak monster pulls off a giant-killing feat.

Choose whichever you prefer, embodying the monster you envision.

This bot was created based on requests and references.

I received requests for more illustrations of Celestina, so I've posted them on Pixiv.

I hope to continue adding more character illustrations in this manner going forward.

https://www.pixiv.net/artworks/141305294
creator: King_Spino
